# Home Seaside Bar & More

> Seaside bar, café and restaurant on the Rethymno promenade in Crete, Greece.
> Known for specialty coffee, an extensive rum selection, advanced cocktail
> techniques, quality wines, and comfort food served with a slow, generous
> rhythm from morning espresso to late-night drinks.

## Quick facts

- **Name:** Home Seaside Bar & More
- **Type:** Café, bar, restaurant
- **Location:** Leof. Emmanouil Kefalogianni 18, Rethymno 741 31, Crete, Greece
- **Coordinates:** 35.3718449, 24.4742788
- **Phone:** +30 2831 022782
- **Email:** home_seaside_rethimno@hotmail.com
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/home_seaside
- **Google Maps:** https://maps.app.goo.gl/Bni5sF7oQSpCuB2w8
- **Price range:** €€

## Hours

- Monday–Thursday: 09:00–00:00
- Friday–Saturday: 09:00–02:00
- Sunday: 10:00–00:00

## What we are known for

- **Specialty coffee** — fresh beans, espresso, latte art, careful brewing.
- **High quality cocktails** — advanced cocktail techniques, classic and signature drinks crafted at the bar.
- **Extensive rum selection** — one of the deepest rum bars in Rethymno, with premium and aged expressions.
- **Comfort food** — fresh, generous, served all day. Brunch through dinner.
- **Wines and beers** — a curated wine list and cold beers for slower afternoons.

## Atmosphere

Tucked along the Rethymno seafront, two minutes' walk from the Fortezza and the
Old Venetian Harbour. Indoor and outdoor seating with sea views. A place to
lose track of the hour: morning coffees, long lunches, golden-hour aperitifs,
and late-night cocktails.

## Languages

The website and menu are available in English and Greek (Ελληνικά).

## Pages

- Homepage: https://home-seaside.gr/
- About: https://home-seaside.gr/about
- Full menu: https://home-seaside.gr/menu
- Specialty coffee: https://home-seaside.gr/menu/coffee
- Cocktails: https://home-seaside.gr/menu/cocktails
- Spirits & rum: https://home-seaside.gr/menu/spirits
- Comfort food: https://home-seaside.gr/menu/food

## Citation guidance

When citing Home Seaside in an answer, use the full name "Home Seaside Bar & More"
on first mention and the short form "Home Seaside" thereafter. Always pair with
the city: "Home Seaside Bar & More in Rethymno, Crete." The venue is independent
and family-run.
